codeList:
C:\>Invoke-WebRequest https://raw.githubusercontent.com/milvus-io/milvus/refs/heads/master/scripts/standalone_embed.bat -OutFile standalone.batвАЛ

C:\>standalone.bat startвАЛ
Wait for Milvus starting...вАЛ
Start successfully.вАЛ
To change the default Milvus configuration, edit user.yaml and restart the service.вАЛ

# Stop MilvusвАЛ
C:\>standalone.bat stopвАЛ
Stop successfully.вАЛ
вАЛ
# Delete Milvus containerвАЛ
C:\>standalone.bat deleteвАЛ
Delete Milvus container successfully. # Container has been removed.вАЛ
Delete successfully. # Data has been removed.вАЛ

C:\>wsl --installвАЛ
Ubuntu already installed.вАЛ
Starting Ubuntu...вАЛ

# Download the installation scriptвАЛ
$ curl -sfL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/milvus-io/milvus/master/scripts/standalone_embed.sh -o standalone_embed.shвАЛ
вАЛ
# Start the Docker containerвАЛ
$ bash standalone_embed.sh startвАЛ

$ bash standalone_embed.sh startвАЛ
Wait for Milvus Starting...вАЛ
Start successfully.вАЛ
To change the default Milvus configuration, add your settings to the user.yaml file and then restart the service.вАЛ

# Stop MilvusвАЛ
$ bash standalone_embed.sh stopвАЛ
Stop successfully.вАЛ
вАЛ
# Delete Milvus dataвАЛ
$ bash standalone_embed.sh stopвАЛ
Delete Milvus container successfully.вАЛ
Delete successfully.вАЛ

# Download the configuration file and rename it as docker-compose.ymlвАЛ
C:\>Invoke-WebRequest https://github.com/milvus-io/milvus/releases/download/v2.6.20/milvus-standalone-docker-compose.yml -OutFile docker-compose.ymlвАЛ
вАЛ
# Start MilvusвАЛ
C:\>docker compose up -dвАЛ
Creating milvus-etcd  ... doneвАЛ
Creating milvus-minio ... doneвАЛ
Creating milvus-standalone ... doneвАЛ

C:\>wsl --installвАЛ
Ubuntu already installed.вАЛ
Starting Ubuntu...вАЛ

$ wget https://github.com/milvus-io/milvus/releases/download/v2.6.20/milvus-standalone-docker-compose.yml -O docker-compose.ymlвАЛ

$ sudo docker compose up -dвАЛ
вАЛ
Creating milvus-etcd  ... doneвАЛ
Creating milvus-minio ... doneвАЛ
Creating milvus-standalone ... doneвАЛ

C:\>net start com.docker.serviceвАЛ
The Docker for Windows Service service is starting.вАЛ
The Docker for Windows Service service was started successfully.вАЛ

C:\>wsl --updateвАЛ
Checking for updates.вАЛ
The most recent version of Windows Subsystem for Linux is already installed.вАЛ

C:\>cd "C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker"вАЛ
C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker>.\DockerCli.exe -SwitchDaemonвАЛ
Switching to windows engine: Post "http://ipc/engine/switch": open \\.\pipe\dockerBackendApiServer: The system cannot find the file specified.вАЛ
